description: The avatar creator component is the component that drives the functionality of the avatar creator object. See Avatar Creation for a much less technical page on this, and for information on how to actually use the avatar creator.

fields._headsetPoint: the headset point that marks the head proxy target slot position.
fields._leftPoint: the point that marks the left hand's target slot position.
fields._rightPoint: the point that marks the right hand's target slot position.
fields._leftFootPoint: the point that marks the foot's target slot position.
fields._rightFootPoint: the point that marks the right foot target slot position.
fields._pelvisPoint: the pelvis guide object that marks the pelvis proxy position.
fields._headsetReference: the headset guide that marks the headset proxy position (eyeballs/view position)
fields._pelvisReference: the pelvis guide object that marks the pelvis proxy position.
fields._leftReference: the left hand guide object that marks the left hand proxy.
fields._rightReference: the right hand guide object that marks the right hand proxy.
fields._initialized: whether this avatar creator is ready to be used.
fields._showAnchors: whether to show the tool anchors on the hands.
fields._useSymmetry: whether to enforce symmetry of the objects across the headset location during settup.
fields._setupVolumeMeter: Whether to set up a volume meter component on the avatar when the avatar is created.
fields._setupProtection: Whether to set up avatar protection components on the root and meshes of the avatar upon creation.
fields._setupEyes: Whether to set up the eye bones and eye manager upon avatar creation
fields._setupFaceTracking: Whether to set up a face tracking component for the mesh with the most shapekey matches for visemes.
fields._calibrateFeet: Whether to show the feet calibration guide objects.
fields._calibratePelvis: whether to show the pelvis calibration guide object.
fields._canProtect: Whether the user is allowed to protect. This is false if in local.
fields._symmetrySetup: Whether to enforce symmetry on the avatar when creating.
fields._anchors: A list of Anchor that are the different parts for avatar markers the user can move when using this creator.
fields._scale: the scale of all the ``_anchors`` of this avatar creator.
fields._protectAvatarEnabled: The protect avatar checkbox button enabled field. The checkbox disables when in user space
fields._createEnabled: The field that controls the enabled state of the create avatar button.

usage: Used for creating avatars. You can spawn it from your Local Space if you have the Builder Role permission to spawn it.
